assertions.description: Correctly finds U1 (BU9796AMUV-E2 LCD segment driver), 2x 10K I2C pull-ups (R1/R2) on SCL_LCD/SDA_LCD nets, 3 solder jumpers for I2C address/signal routing, LCD connector (LCD1, 16-pin), decoupling cap C1 (0.1uF on +3V3). Bus analysis correctly identifies I2C with pull-ups present. Net connectivity for all COM/SEG signals to LCD connector is correct.

GND and +3V3 rails have no PWR_FLAG symbols and no power_out driver in the kicad_sch (power comes from the Feather connector, modeled in the legacy .sch). The ERC warning is technically valid for this file in isolation. This is the known KH-160 pattern (connector-powered designs triggering PWR_FLAG warnings).
